sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ التَّغْذِيَةُ السَّلِيمَةُ دَوْرًا مِحْوَرِيًّا فِي تَعْزِيزِ كَفَاءَةِ الْجِهَازِ الْمَنَاعِيِّ لَدَى الْإِنْسَانِ ضِدَّ الْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pravilna ishrana igra ključnu ulogu u jačanju efikasnosti imunološkog sistema čovjeka protiv raznih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Proper nutrition plays a pivotal role in enhancing the efficiency of the human immune system against various diseases.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَنَاوُلَ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ الْغَنِيَّةِ بِالْفِيتَامِينَاتِ يُسَاعِدُ الْجِسْمَ عَلَى مُقَاوَمَةِ الِالْتِهَابَاتِ وَتَرْمِيمِ الْخَلَايَا التَّالِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Konzumiranje povrća i voća bogatog vitaminima pomaže tijelu da se odupre upalama i obnovi oštećene ćelije.
sentences.translationEn: Consuming vegetables and fruits rich in vitamins helps the body resist inflammation and repair damaged cells.

sentences.arabic: يُحَذِّرُ خُبَرَاءُ التَّغْذِيَةِ مِنَ الِاعْتِمَادِ الْمُفْرِطِ عَلَى الْأَطْعِمَةِ الْمُعَالَجَةِ الَّتِي تَفْتَقِرُ إِلَى الْعَنَاصِرِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Nutricionisti upozoravaju na pretjerano oslanjanje na prerađenu hranu kojoj nedostaju esencijalni hranljivi sastojci.
sentences.translationEn: Nutrition experts warn against excessive reliance on processed foods that lack essential nutritional elements.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا تَمَّ تَبَنِّي نِظَامٍ غِذَائِيٍّ مُتَوَازِنٍ مُنْذُ الصِّغَرِ، فَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ سَيُؤَدِّي إِلَى تَقْلِيلِ مَخَاطِرِ الْإِصَابَةِ بِالسُّمْنَةِ وَأَمْرَاضِ الْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Ako se od malih nogu usvoji uravnotežena ishrana, to će dovesti do smanjenja rizika od gojaznosti i srčanih oboljenja.
sentences.translationEn: If a balanced diet is adopted from a young age, it will lead to reducing the risks of obesity and heart disease.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ شُرْبُ الْمَاءِ بِكَمِيَّاتٍ كَافِيَةٍ جُزْءًا لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنْ خُطَّةِ التَّغْذِيَةِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ لِضَمَانِ عَمَلِ الْأَعْضَاءِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ بِكَفَاءَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje dovoljne količine vode smatra se sastavnim dijelom plana zdrave ishrane kako bi se osigurao efikasan rad vitalnih organa.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking adequate amounts of water is considered an integral part of a healthy nutrition plan to ensure that vital organs function efficiently.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ أَنْ تُصْبِحَ الثَّقَافَةُ الْغِذَائِيَّةُ مَنْهَجَ حَيَاةٍ لَا مُجَرَّدَ حِمْيَةٍ مُؤَقَّتَةٍ لِفَقْدِ الْوَزْنِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga kultura ishrane mora postati način života, a ne samo privremena dijeta za gubitak težine.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, nutritional culture must become a way of life, not just a temporary diet for weight loss.
